stemEn:
Christina is a professional financial adviser representative (FAR), and this role carries a privilege.

Which of the following statements regarding the meaning of this privilege is TRUE?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Christina is a professional 财务顾问代表 (FAR), and this role carries a privilege. 以下哪项陈述 regarding the meaning of this privilege 是真实/正确的?

optionsEn.A: FAR has the privilege to be exempted from account opening fee when investing their monies with banks.
optionsEn.B: FAR has the privilege to be protected from being sued by clients.
optionsEn.C: FAR has the privilege to ask for sensitive financial information from a client.
optionsEn.D: FAR has the privilege to have special interest rates from bank deposits.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】FAR has the privilege to be exempted from account opening fee when investing their monies with banks.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】FAR has the privilege to be protected from being sued by clients.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】FAR has the privilege to ask for sensitive financial information from a client.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】FAR has the privilege to have special interest rates from bank deposits.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s14: Why Professional Ethics Matter；匹配段落：Multiple motivations / The adviser's role is a privilege。来源：RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.14 — Why Professional Ethics Matter (SCI, Version 1.1)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Acting according to the same principles in every situation.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Multiple motivations: Self-interest: acting in the client's best interest for fees, commissions, income or promotion, and for fear of sanctions, legal punishment and reputational damage — broadly, putting the client first IS self-interest; having self-interest is not wrong, but the duty of care to the client must come first. The adviser's role is a privilege: A professional is one who uses technical knowledge and skill to place a client in a better position; acting solely to make the sale fails that ethical code.

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Giving in to temptations and making rationalizations.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 守则的法律地位: 守则由 MAS("Authority")依 SFA(2001)第 321 条发出,设定管理人、获批受托人、VCC 董事及 VCC/子基金托管人应遵守的最佳实践。守则属非法定性质,违反本身不致使任何人承担刑责;但在民事或刑事诉讼中可被援引以证立或否定相关责任。计划责任人违反守则,MAS 可据 SFA 第 286/287 条考虑撤销或暂停计划的授权或认可,或拒绝其新计划;受托人或托管人违反,MAS 可据第 289 条考虑撤回批准或禁止其担任新计划的受托人/托管人。守则首发于 2002-05-23,最近修订于 2023-05-23。

stemEn:
Jenny, a licensed financial adviser representative, attracts clients by offering them a large portion of her commission.

Which of the following statements regarding such ethical conduct is TRUE?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Jenny, a 持牌财务顾问 代表, attracts clients by offering them a large portion of her commission. 以下哪项陈述 regarding such ethical conduct 是真实/正确的?

optionsEn.A: Rebating of commission to clients is an unethical behaviour.
optionsEn.B: Rebating of commission to clients is illegal and her license can be revoked.
optionsEn.C: Rebating of commission to clients is a criminal act punishable by a jail term.
optionsEn.D: Rebating of commission to clients is permissible if it is declared to MAS promptly.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Rebating of commission to clients is an unethical behaviour.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Rebating of commission to clients is illegal and her license can be revoked.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Rebating of commission to clients is a criminal act punishable by a jail term.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Rebating of commission to clients is permissible if it is declared to MAS promptly.

stemEn:
Roger is a licensed financial adviser representative. His clients, Andy and Emma (husband and wife) have recently filed for divorce. Roger advises Andy to buy a large insurance policy for his elderly parents and park the policy under a living trust so that he can pay a lower divorce settlement to his ex-wife.

Which of the following statements correctly describes Roger’s ethical behaviour?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger is a 持牌财务顾问 代表. His clients, Andy and Emma (husband and wife) have recently filed for divorce. Roger advises Andy to buy a large insurance policy for his elderly parents and park the policy under a living trust so that he can pay a lower divorce settlement to his ex-wife. 以下哪项陈述 correctly describes Roger’s ethical behaviour?

optionsEn.A: Roger creates a conflict-of-interest situation by putting Emma in a worse-off situation.
optionsEn.B: Roger finds himself in a “built-in” unethical situation.
optionsEn.C: Roger’s behaviour is ethical if he has declared the facts clearly to Roger’s parents.
optionsEn.D: Roger’s commission will be clawed back as such sales are considered unethical and not in the best interest for clients.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger creates a conflict-of-interest situation by putting Emma in a worse-off situation.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger finds himself in a “built-in” unethical situation.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger’s behaviour is ethical if he has declared the facts clearly to Roger’s parents.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Roger’s commission will be clawed back as such sales are considered unethical and not in the best interest for clients.

stemEn:
Tense situations are inevitable while servicing clients over an extended time.

Which of the following is a recommended step in dealing with such situations?

optionsEn.B: Avoiding potential liability by denying all inconveniences caused.
optionsEn.C: Offering financial compensation to the client.
optionsEn.D: Determining the facts of the situation.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s14: Why Professional Ethics Matter；匹配段落：什么是职业道德。来源：RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.14 — Why Professional Ethics Matter (SCI, Version 1.1)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 C：Solvency ratio.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 什么是职业道德: “ethics”源自希腊语“ethos”。亚里士多德认为有德之人即拥有美德习惯之人(诚实、正义、荣誉、好脾气),且美德可通过教育、训练与实践习得。道德关乎社会判断人之行为对错的标准,且始终带有主观性。职业道德则是专业人士对待客户、同业及公众的一套行为准则或道德原则,要求即使可能因此失去生意,也要做对的事。

optionAnalysis.D: 排除：D. Debt-to-asset ratio.。它不是本题要求的答案；复核时先看题干限定词，再拿它和正确项 C. Solvency ratio. 以及讲义“什么是职业道德”逐项对照。

'财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语: 第 17 条:除持牌 FA、豁免 FA 或获 MAS 批准者外,任何人不得使用'financial adviser'或'life insurance broker'字样;代表可加'representative'使用。违反第 17(1)/(3) 可处不超过 S$12,500 罚款,持续犯罪每日加罚不超过 S$1,250。第 21 条:FA 须不收/不付可能造成产品偏向的佣金或利益、无相关产品限制、无利益冲突,方可使用'independent'字样;违反构成犯罪。

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s14: Why Professional Ethics Matter；匹配段落：Why ethics matters in financial services / 合德≠合规:两类情境与 CPD 例子。来源：RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.14 — Why Professional Ethics Matter (SCI, Version 1.1)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Term Insurance with Critical Illness Rider.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Why ethics matters in financial services: In Singapore the sector exceeds 15% of GDP, with over 15,000 financial institutions moving billions daily; products are intangible (insurance, ILPs, capital-markets), so customers cannot assess them like cars or apartments and must rely on the representative for suitable advice. 合德≠合规:两类情境与 CPD 例子: 合规却不道德:Adam 借培训课暗中挖角他社代表,未透明告知,未违反任何合规规则却高度不道德。道德却不合规:Mary 想另设私人公司就财务规划服务向客户收费(而非产品销售),却因违反法规被公司驳回。再如 CPD:某代表报名一天 CPD 课却在后排玩手机/电脑,签退即取得 CPD 学时——法律上技术上确已合规,但道德上他并未做对的事(答案多半为否)。两案不代表当事人品格低劣,有时出发点是好的,执行中却无意触及道德与合规。

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 A：It is a document that sets out the client’s net estate distribution instructions after his death.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Multiple motivations: Self-interest: acting in the client's best interest for fees, commissions, income or promotion, and for fear of sanctions, legal punishment and reputational damage — broadly, putting the client first IS self-interest; having self-interest is not wrong, but the duty of care to the client must come first. The adviser's role is a privilege: Ethically the adviser must analyse the information and recommend products that leave the client better off than before.

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Customers who are entrepreneurs and self-employed.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions: A 'financial adviser' (Section 2(1)) is a 'person' (a corporation, not an individual) carrying on the business of financial advisory services, excluding First Schedule persons. Definition of representative, one-principal rule and gating: Section 2(1) defines a 'representative' as an individual in the employment of, acting for, or by arrangement with an FA who performs financial advisory services on its behalf (whether or not remunerated).

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 B：Promote a sound and progressive financial services sector.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Licence application and exempt persons: An FA licence application (Section 7(1), FAR Reg 6/7) is made on Form 1 with a non-refundable fee; the MAS weighs track record, financial soundness, minimum financial and professional-indemnity (PI) requirements, compliance systems, business plans and fitness/propriety. stemEn:
You, as a representative of a licensed financial adviser, have made statements to a customer during the sale process. However, you have omitted to disclose a matter which is material to the statements.

Which of the following regarding omission to disclose a matter material to the statements is TRUE?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】You, as a 代表 of a 持牌财务顾问, have made statements to a customer during the sale process. However, you have omitted to disclose a matter which is material to the statements. 关于以下事项，哪一项 omission to disclose a matter material to the statements 是真实/正确的?

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】It is careless statement.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】It is a reckless statement.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】It is a fraudulent statement.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】It is a misleading statement.

stemEn:
The provision in section 45 of the Financial Advisers Act is to avoid conflict of interest situations.

Which of the following should a representative of a financial adviser do where such conflict of interests cannot be avoided?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】The provision in section 45 of the 《财务顾问法》（FAA） is to avoid 利益冲突 situations. Which of the following should a 代表 of a financial adviser do where such 利益冲突s cannot be avoided?

optionsEn.A: Treat the customer fairly and equitably.
optionsEn.B: Treat the customer equally and professionally.
optionsEn.C: Introduce the customer to another financial adviser.
optionsEn.D: Refer the customer to seek independent professional advice.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Treat the customer fairly and equitably.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Treat the customer equally and professionally.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Introduce the customer to another financial adviser.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Refer the customer to seek independent professional advice.

Which of the following relating to the omission in the statement is CORRECT?

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：MAS powers, false statements and appeals / Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Misleading statement.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 MAS powers, false statements and appeals: Section 32(1): a false or misleading statement, or omission of a material matter, in a notification is an offence carrying a fine up to S$50,000 (s32(4) gives a reasonable-inquiry defence). Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions: Section 6(1) FAA prohibits acting as a financial adviser unless licensed or an exempt financial adviser.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent' / Regulated and excluded products。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Investment-linked life policies.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent': Section 17: only a licensed FA, an exempt FA or an MAS-approved person may use 'financial adviser' or 'life insurance broker'; representatives may use the term together with 'representative'. Regulated and excluded products: 'Investment product' (Section 2(1)) means capital markets products, spot FX contracts other than for leveraged FX trading, any life policy, and other prescribed products; structured deposits became investment products from 2 December 2005.

stemEn:
John Doe is a representative of a financial adviser in the life insurance business. He provides advisory services on life insurance and related products. He knows about the FAA-N16, which is the notice on recommendations on investment products to customers (the “Notice”).

Which of the following will the Notice be applicable in John’s advisory services to customers with respect to simple life policies sold as an ancillary product to loans with a simple payment basis for the insurance cover?

He knows about the FAA-N16, which is the notice on recommendations on 投资产品s to customers (the “Notice”). optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Mortgage reducing assurance plans.

Which of the following should you conduct for Jack before you recommend an unlisted SIP to him?

stemEn: In recommending a customer to switch from an original designated investment product to a replacement investment product, which of the following will the relevant Authority consider whether the switch is beneficial to the customer?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】In recommending a customer to switch from an original designated 投资产品 to a replacement 投资产品, which of the following will the relevant Authority consider whether the switch is beneficial to the customer?

optionsEn.A: Customer pays a small fee for terminating the original product.
optionsEn.B: Customer incurs transaction cost for terminating the original product.
optionsEn.C: Replacement product confers the same level of benefit at a lower cost.
optionsEn.D: Replacement product confers the same level of benefit at the same cost.

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 A：Principal.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent': Section 17: only a licensed FA, an exempt FA or an MAS-approved person may use 'financial adviser' or 'life insurance broker'; representatives may use the term together with 'representative'. Definition of representative, one-principal rule and gating: Section 27(1): unless approved by the MAS in writing, an appointed/provisional representative may not represent more than one principal at a time (related corporations excepted); breach carries up to S$25,000 fine or 12 months' imprisonment or both.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent' / '财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 A：Up to 3 rounds.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent': Section 17: only a licensed FA, an exempt FA or an MAS-approved person may use 'financial adviser' or 'life insurance broker'; representatives may use the term together with 'representative'. '财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语: 第 17 条:除持牌 FA、豁免 FA 或获 MAS 批准者外,任何人不得使用'financial adviser'或'life insurance broker'字样;代表可加'representative'使用。违反第 17(1)/(3) 可处不超过 S$12,500 罚款,持续犯罪每日加罚不超过 S$1,250。第 21 条:FA 须不收/不付可能造成产品偏向的佣金或利益、无相关产品限制、无利益冲突,方可使用'independent'字样;违反构成犯罪。

explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 A：Up to 3 months.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Appointed vs provisional representatives: An appointed representative (Section 23) fully meets the MAS entry and examination requirements (Notice FAA-N13), is entered in the Public Register, and has a status not revoked/suspended. Notification procedure, retention and cessation: Section 26(1): to appoint a representative the principal lodges a notice of intent, a fit-and-proper certificate and, for a provisional representative, an undertaking.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions / Licence application and exempt persons。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：25%。题干要求找 NOT/FALSE/EXCEPT 一类的例外项，正确答案通常不是常规规则本身，而是与讲义规则不一致或不属于该范围的选项。 Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions: A 'financial adviser' (Section 2(1)) is a 'person' (a corporation, not an individual) carrying on the business of financial advisory services, excluding First Schedule persons. Licence application and exempt persons: An FA licence application (Section 7(1), FAR Reg 6/7) is made on Form 1 with a non-refundable fee; the MAS weighs track record, financial soundness, minimum financial and professional-indemnity (PI) requirements, compliance systems, business plans and fitness/propriety.

'财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语: 第 17 条:除持牌 FA、豁免 FA 或获 MAS 批准者外,任何人不得使用'financial adviser'或'life insurance broker'字样;代表可加'representative'使用。违反第 17(1)/(3) 可处不超过 S$12,500 罚款,持续犯罪每日加罚不超过 S$1,250。第 21 条:FA 须不收/不付可能造成产品偏向的佣金或利益、无相关产品限制、无利益冲突,方可使用'independent'字样;违反构成犯罪。

stemEn:
You are the sales director of a bank in Singapore. You intend to have a roadshow at an MRT station at Orchard Road for the provision of financial advisory services in respect of structured deposits (the “roadshow”). The location of the roadshow is considered a new place of business.

Which of the following would you make the application for prior approval for the conduct of the roadshow?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】You are the sales director of a bank in Singapore. You intend to have a roadshow at an MRT station at Orchard Road for the provision of financial advisory services in respect of structured deposits (the “roadshow”). The location of the roadshow is considered a new place of business. Which of the following would you make the application for prior approval for the conduct of the roadshow?

optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】新加坡金融管理局（MAS）.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Licence application and exempt persons / Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 C：Monetary Authority of Singapore.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Licence application and exempt persons: An FA licence application (Section 7(1), FAR Reg 6/7) is made on Form 1 with a non-refundable fee; the MAS weighs track record, financial soundness, minimum financial and professional-indemnity (PI) requirements, compliance systems, business plans and fitness/propriety. Licensing need, exemptions and exclusions: A 'financial adviser' (Section 2(1)) is a 'person' (a corporation, not an individual) carrying on the business of financial advisory services, excluding First Schedule persons.

stemEn:
John Doe is a provisional representative of an exempt financial adviser, and he sometimes advises his customers to switch from an original designated investment to a designated replacement investment product.

Which of the following is NOT one of John’s obligations in recommending customers to switch designated investment products?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】John Doe is a provisional 代表 of an 豁免财务顾问, and he sometimes advises his customers to switch from an original designated investment to a designated replacement 投资产品. 以下哪一项不是 one of John’s obligations in recommending customers to switch designated 投资产品s?

optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Document basis for the switch.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Ensure switch benefits the customer.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Ensure customer makes informed decision.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent' / Regulated and excluded products。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 C：Ensure switch benefits the customer.。题干要求找 NOT/FALSE/EXCEPT 一类的例外项，正确答案通常不是常规规则本身，而是与讲义规则不一致或不属于该范围的选项。 Use of 'financial adviser' / 'life insurance broker' / 'independent': Section 17: only a licensed FA, an exempt FA or an MAS-approved person may use 'financial adviser' or 'life insurance broker'; representatives may use the term together with 'representative'. Regulated and excluded products: 'Investment product' (Section 2(1)) means capital markets products, spot FX contracts other than for leveraged FX trading, any life policy, and other prescribed products; structured deposits became investment products from 2 December 2005.

stemEn: Which of the following is the front-end monitoring of switching of designated investment products?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】以下哪一项是 the front-end monitoring of switching of designated 投资产品s?

optionsEn.A: Customer declaration that he has been advised by his representative of the switch.
optionsEn.B: Procedures and controls to identify any unusual trends in switching transactions.
optionsEn.C: Checking the past transactions of customer for each new purchase to detect undeclared switches.
optionsEn.D: Checking the volume of switches to identify representatives with an usually high volume of switching transactions.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Customer declaration that he has been advised by his 代表 of the switch.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Procedures and controls to identify any unusual trends in switching transactions.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Checking the past transactions of customer for each new purchase to detect undeclared switches.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Checking the volume of switches to identify 代表s with an usually high volume of switching transactions.

stemEn:
FAA-G14 sets out the guidelines on the balanced scorecard framework, reference checks and pre-transaction checks.

Which of the following is NOT defined as the “effective date” in relation to a transaction which is a life insurance policy?

optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】The policy has terminated.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】The policy has commenced.

stemEn:
A financial adviser should institute controls to check that its representatives have followed through its prescribed advisory and sales process to provide its clients with quality advice and appropriate recommendations (“Pre-transaction Checks”).

Which of the following is one of this Pre-transaction Checks?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】A financial adviser should institute controls to check that its 代表s have followed through its prescribed advisory and sales process to provide its clients with quality advice and appropriate recommendations (“Pre-transaction Checks”). 以下哪一项是 one of this Pre-transaction Checks?

optionsEn.C: Information about the client’s lasting power of attorney.
optionsEn.D: Information about the adviser’s declaration of relationship with the client.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Information about the client’s will.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Basis of adviser’s recommendation.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Information about the client’s lasting power of attorney.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Information about the adviser’s declaration of relationship with the client.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s04: MAS Notices — Part II [FAA-N02; FAA-N10; FAA-N12; FAA-N14; FAA-N20; FAA-N26]；匹配段落：FAA-N20 Balanced Scorecard Framework and ISA Unit / FAA-N02 Appointment and Use of Introducers。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.4 — MAS Notices Part II [FAA-N02; FAA-N10; FAA-N12; FAA-N14; FAA-N20; FAA-N26]。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 B：Basis of adviser’s recommendation.。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 FAA-N20 Balanced Scorecard Framework and ISA Unit: The FA must have an Independent Sales Audit (ISA) Unit whose members are independent of the financial advisory services unit, do not supervise the relevant representatives, and are competent to assess service quality and determine infractions. FAA-N02 Appointment and Use of Introducers: "Introducing activity" means introducing a client to an introducee for financial advisory service, and may include recording and forwarding client particulars with consent and providing factual product information.

reviewChecklist: FAA-N02 介绍人须书面协议、披露(FAR Reg 31)、提供脚本、不碰客户钱财、登记册 / Introducers: written agreement, FAR Reg 31 disclosure, script, no client money, register
FAA-N10 豁免人(Reg 27(1)(d))每场合 ≤30 名认可投资者、不得自称受 MAS 发牌规管 / Exempt persons: ≤30 accredited investors per occasion; may not claim MAS licensing/regulation
FAA-N12 临时代表 21 岁、3 年经验、学士学位、3 个月有效期 / Provisional rep: 21yo, 3yrs experience, Bachelor's, 3-month validity
FAA-N14 不当行为发现后 14 天经 MASNET 报告；罚款最高 $25,000、每日 $2,500 / Misconduct reported within 14 days via MASNET; fine up to $25,000, $2,500/day

stemEn:
Andy is a supervisor of a financial adviser firm. He has been assigned a Balanced Scorecard Grade of “Unsatisfactory” for two consecutive calendar quarters. He is disallowed to perform any supervisory or managerial role for a period from the date he was assigned the second consecutive grade of “Unsatisfactory (the “Period”).

Which of the following is the Period?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Andy is a supervisor of a financial adviser firm. He has been assigned a Balanced Scorecard Grade of “Unsatisfactory” for two consecutive calendar quarters. He is disallowed to perform any supervisory or managerial role for a period from the date he was assigned the second consecutive grade of “Unsatisfactory (the “Period”). 以下哪一项是 the Period?

stemEn:
The supervisor of a representative assigned a Balanced Scorecard Grade of “E” must accompany the representative during the advisory sales process of a closed sale.

stemEn:
John, a financial adviser representative of an insurance company, is assigned a Balanced Scorecard Grade of “E” in a calendar quarter. He is placed under close supervision by the insurance company.
Which of the following should have oversight of the close supervision?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】John, a 财务顾问代表 of an insurance company, is assigned a Balanced Scorecard Grade of “E” in a calendar quarter. He is placed under close supervision by the insurance company. Which of the following should have oversight of the close supervision?

optionsEn.C: A person designated by the chief executive officer.
optionsEn.D: A person designated by the legal counsel.

optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】A person designated by the chief executive officer.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】A person designated by the legal counsel.

optionsEn.B: Fair Dealing Outcome 3 - Financial institutions have competent representatives to provide appropriate recommendations.
optionsEn.C: Fair Dealing Outcome 4 - Customers receive clear, relevant and timely information to make informed financial decisions.
optionsEn.D: Fair Dealing Outcome 5 - Clients are dealing with financial institutions where fair dealing is their culture.

optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】公平交易 Outcome 5 - Clients are dealing with financial institutions where 公平交易 is their culture.

stemEn:
FAA-G10 sets out the guidelines on switching of designated investment products. To facilitate the monitoring of switching that may be detrimental to any customer’s interest, financial advisers are to ensure that they have robust monitoring controls, processes, and procedures (the “monitoring procedures”) in place commensurate with the nature of their business and risks.

How many types of monitoring procedures are set out in the guidelines?

stemEn:

Which of the following fair dealing outcomes would the FIs achieve in conducting product due diligence marketing to target customer segments?

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s11: Revised Code on Collective Investment Schemes；匹配段落：Key changes introduced / Core investment requirements (Appendix 1)。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Revised Code on Collective Investment Schemes (MAS, SFA s321)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：Reinsurance recoverables.。题干要求找 NOT/FALSE/EXCEPT 一类的例外项，正确答案通常不是常规规则本身，而是与讲义规则不一致或不属于该范围的选项。 Key changes introduced: MAS will only recognise a foreign scheme if satisfied its investment guidelines are substantially similar to the revised Code. Core investment requirements (Appendix 1): Permissible investments are limited to transferable securities, money market instruments, eligible deposits, units in other schemes, financial derivatives, and unlisted shares/equivalent securities.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s11: Revised Code on Collective Investment Schemes；匹配段落：Key changes introduced / Manager's responsibilities and operational obligations。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.11 — Revised Code on Collective Investment Schemes (MAS, SFA s321)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 A：10%。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Key changes introduced: MAS will only recognise a foreign scheme if satisfied its investment guidelines are substantially similar to the revised Code. Manager's responsibilities and operational obligations: It must not invest scheme monies in its own or related corporations' securities (unless a benchmark constituent meeting Appendix 1 para 2.3), must not lend scheme monies to related corporations, and must not be the counterparty of an OTC derivative the scheme invests in.

Manager's responsibilities and operational obligations: It must not invest scheme monies in its own or related corporations' securities (unless a benchmark constituent meeting Appendix 1 para 2.3), must not lend scheme monies to related corporations, and must not be the counterparty of an OTC derivative the scheme invests in.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s01: FAA & FAR — Financial Advisers and Representatives；匹配段落：Regulated and excluded products / '财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.1 — Financial Advisers Act (FAA) & Financial Advisers Regulations (FAR): Financial Advisers and Representatives。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 D：CareShield Life is previously known as MediShield Life.。题干要求找 NOT/FALSE/EXCEPT 一类的例外项，正确答案通常不是常规规则本身，而是与讲义规则不一致或不属于该范围的选项。 Regulated and excluded products: 'Investment product' (Section 2(1)) means capital markets products, spot FX contracts other than for leveraged FX trading, any life policy, and other prescribed products; structured deposits became investment products from 2 December 2005. '财务顾问'/'人寿保险经纪'/'独立'用语: 第 17 条:除持牌 FA、豁免 FA 或获 MAS 批准者外,任何人不得使用'financial adviser'或'life insurance broker'字样;代表可加'representative'使用。违反第 17(1)/(3) 可处不超过 S$12,500 罚款,持续犯罪每日加罚不超过 S$1,250。第 21 条:FA 须不收/不付可能造成产品偏向的佣金或利益、无相关产品限制、无利益冲突,方可使用'independent'字样;违反构成犯罪。

stemEn: Which of the following statements relating to the Supplementary Retirement Scheme (SRS) is CORRECT?

optionsEn.B: SRS withdrawals are subject to withdrawal charges under all circumstances.
optionsEn.C: An SRS participant is not allowed to buy into the same investment that he has previously purchased.
optionsEn.D: An SRS participant can choose the amount to contribute to SRS, subject to a cap.

optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】An SRS participant can choose the amount to contribute to SRS, subject to a cap.

stemEn:
Joe lost a lawsuit and is liable to pay $2m to the claimant. He does not have enough bankable assets to pay for the damage. However, he and his wife, Mary, have a fully paid private property. Joe is thinking of taking up home equity loans to pay his legal damages.
Which of the following statements correctly spells out the risk of this strategy?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Joe lost a lawsuit and is liable to pay $2m to the claimant. He does not have enough bankable assets to pay for the damage. However, he and his wife, Mary, have a fully paid private property. Joe is thinking of taking up home equity loans to pay his legal damages. 以下哪项陈述 correctly spells out the risk of this strategy?

optionsEn.A: Joe and Mary should consider speaking with the financial institutions to understand the risk as they may lose the property if they are unable to pay back the loan.
optionsEn.B: Home equity loan is not allowed on private property owned by an individual who is currently undergoing a lawsuit and is subject to paying damages.
optionsEn.C: There is a 30% stamp duty on the property value to be imposed on the home equity loan as it is considered an ownership of a second property.
optionsEn.D: Joe and Mary cannot sell their private property until after 5 years of waiting period from the issuance of the home equity loan.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Joe and Mary should consider speaking with the financial institutions to understand the risk as they may lose the property if they are unable to pay back the loan.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Home equity loan is not allowed on private property owned by an individual who is currently undergoing a lawsuit and is subject to paying damages.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】There is a 30% stamp duty on the property value to be imposed on the home equity loan as it is considered an ownership of a second property.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Joe and Mary cannot sell their private property until after 5 years of waiting period from the issuance of the home equity loan.

stemEn:
Besides retirement, CPF can be used for other objectives such as property purchases. Which of the following statements correctly describes the funding mechanism of CPF for its members in their purchases of properties?
OA = Ordinary Account
SA = Special Account
RA = Retirement Account
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Besides retirement, CPF can be used for other objectives such as property purchases. 以下哪项陈述 correctly describes the funding mechanism of CPF for its members in their purchases of properties? OA = Ordinary Account SA = Special Account RA = Retirement Account

optionsEn.A: CPF members can use their CPF- OA, SA & RA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.B: CPF members can only use their CPFOA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.C: CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of the Basic Retirement Sum (BRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsEn.D: CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of Full Retirement Sum (FRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can use their CPF- OA, SA & RA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can only use their CPFOA to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of the Basic Retirement Sum (BRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF members can only use their CPF after they have met 150% of Full Retirement Sum (FRS) amount to fund their purchases of properties.

stemEn: Which of the following correctly describes the limitation of Eldershield compared to CareShield Life?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Which of the following correctly describes the limitation of Eldershield compared to CareShield Life?

optionsEn.A: Payout from ElderShield is of a limited period whilst payout from CareShield Life can be for lifetime (assuming the CPF member does not recover from severe disability).
optionsEn.B: Premium from ElderShield is not tax deductible, whilst premium for CareShield Life is tax deductible.
optionsEn.C: ElderShield is managed by private insurers and hence the payout is more stringent than CareShield Life, which is managed by CPF Board.
optionsEn.D: Payouts from ElderShield is not creditor protected whilst payout from CareShield Life is creditor protected.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Payout from ElderShield is of a limited period whilst payout from CareShield Life can be for lifetime (assuming the CPF member does not recover from severe disability).
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Premium from ElderShield is not tax deductible, whilst premium for CareShield Life is tax deductible.

explanation.basis: 讲义依据：s13: Central Provident Fund (CPF)；匹配段落：Healthcare financing framework / 医疗融资框架。来源：RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — Central Provident Fund (CPF)。
explanation.correctReason: 正确答案 B：$900。题干要求找正确/最符合规则的选项，正确答案应直接落在讲义中的定义、义务、流程或数字门槛上。 Healthcare financing framework: The Private Medical Insurance Scheme lets members buy Integrated Shield Plans (IPs) with MediSave; an IP has a MediShield Life component plus a private component, the latter payable by MediSave only up to Additional Withdrawal Limits (AWLs): S$300 if 40 or younger on next birthday, S$600 if 41–70, S$900 if 71 or older. 医疗融资框架: 医疗融资以个人责任与可负担为本,框架含:MediSave、MediFund、MediShield Life、Private Medical Insurance Scheme,以及 CareShield Life(2020 年起)/ElderShield。MediSave(1984-04 设)用于住院、日间手术、特定门诊及核准保险费;缴入上限为 Basic Healthcare Sum(BHS),65 岁定终身(2024 年现行 BHS S$71,500),超额转入 SA/RA(或已达 FRS 则转 OA)。MediShield Life 由公积金局管理,为强制性国家基本医疗保险,2015-11-01 起自动覆盖全体 SC/PR,可…

stemEn:
Additional simple interests are credited to the CPF members’ accounts to boost the members’ savings. For CPF members who are below age 55, which of the following statements regarding additional simple interest is correct?
OA = Ordinary Account
SA = Special Account
RA = Retirement Account
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Additional simple interests are credited to the CPF members’ accounts to boost the members’ savings. For CPF members who are below age 55, 以下哪项陈述 regarding additional simple interest 是正确的? OA = Ordinary Account SA = Special Account RA = Retirement Account

optionsEn.A: Members earn an extra interest of 3% per annum on the first $30K (capped at $20K for OA) and 2% per annum on the next $30K of combined CPF balances.
optionsEn.B: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $60K of combined CPF balances (capped at $20K for OA).
optionsEn.C: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $50K of the combined CPF balances (capped at $10K for OA).
optionsEn.D: Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $100K (capped at $30K for OA) of combined CPF OA, SA and RA balances.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 3% per annum on the first $30K (capped at $20K for OA) and 2% per annum on the next $30K of combined CPF balances.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $60K of combined CPF balances (capped at $20K for OA).
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $50K of the combined CPF balances (capped at $10K for OA).
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Members earn an extra interest of 1% per annum on the first $100K (capped at $30K for OA) of combined CPF OA, SA and RA balances.

stemEn:
John has just acquired Singapore permanent residency and is now a CPF member. He wants to understand the returns from CPF Special Account.
Which of the following regarding the return from CPF Special Account is CORRECT?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】John has just acquired Singapore 永久居民身份 and is now a CPF member. He wants to understand the returns from CPF Special Account. 关于以下事项，哪一项 the return from CPF Special Account 是正确的?

optionsEn.A: CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 4% per annum.
optionsEn.B: CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 6% per annum.
optionsEn.C: CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 15-year MAS Securities plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.
optionsEn.D: CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 10-year Singapore Government Securities (SGS) plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 4% per annum.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 3-month average of major local banks’ interest rates, subject to a legislated minimum interest of 6% per annum.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 15-year MAS Securities plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】CPF Special Account is based on the 12-month average yield of the 10-year Singapore Government Securities (SGS) plus 1%, subject to the current floor interest rate of 4% per annum.

stemEn: Which of the following statements regarding the use of CPF funds for hospitalisation expenses is CORRECT?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】以下哪项陈述 regarding the use of CPF funds for hospitalisation expenses 是正确的?

optionsEn.A: Funds from CPF Medisave Account can be used for hospitalisation expenses.
optionsEn.B: Funds from CPF Ordinary, Special Accounts and Retirement Accounts can be used for hospitalisation expenses.
optionsEn.C: Only funds above $100K from CPF Special Account (SA) can be used for hospitalisation expenses.
optionsEn.D: 50% of CPF funds can be used for hospitalisation expenses.

optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Only funds above $100K from CPF Special Account (SA) can be used for hospitalisation expenses.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】50% of CPF funds can be used for hospitalisation expenses.

stemEn:
Peter, who is from an Asia Pacific country, has recently obtained his permanent residency.
Which of the following regarding his CPF contribution is CORRECT?
stemZh: 【学习辅助翻译】Peter, who is from an 亚太国家, has recently obtained his 永久居民身份. 关于以下事项，哪一项 his CPF 缴款 是正确的?

optionsEn.A: Peter is exempted from CPF contribution as he is a permanent resident and not a citizen.
optionsEn.B: Peter and his employer are both required to contribute to his CPF.
optionsEn.C: Peter is only required to contribute to his CPF Medisave account as he is not a Singapore Citizen.
optionsEn.D: Peter’s contribution to his CPF is voluntary as he is not born in Singapore.

optionsZh.A: 【学习辅助翻译】Peter is exempted from CPF 缴款 as he is a 永久居民 and not a 公民.
optionsZh.B: 【学习辅助翻译】Peter and his employer 都必须为他的 CPF 缴款.
optionsZh.C: 【学习辅助翻译】Peter is 只需向其 CPF Medisave 账户缴款 as he is not a 新加坡公民.
optionsZh.D: 【学习辅助翻译】Peter’s CPF 缴款是自愿的 as he is 不是在新加坡出生.
